name: Septiceye Egos
description:
Ok. Another throwback bc I've been sick and throwing back to the old stuff I love. So I got creative with this one.

In the sense of not being parasocial, the characters included are Jackieboy, Marvin, Schneeplestein, Chase, Sam, Anti and Jack(not Sean, the YouTube personified Jack yk?)

A lot of fandom influenced designs for the egos. They all live together in a pocket universe Jack can travel to, they were accidental creations, etc

BUT! Jack has a good friend, an editor, a fellow co-creator behind the scenes who helped with design and ideas for the egos. You! And with how it's broken up, Jack has more sway on the creation of Jackieboy and Chase, and you had more influence on Schneep and Marvin. You're both creators but have slightly more influence on respective egos.

Intro one is first being introduced after not meeting the egos, second intro is afterwards whenever you're visiting (more open exploration yk?)

Another I made just for me but thought someone else would like too. Very 'creators paternal, egos are creations and semi like kids' but umentioned mostly just keep it in mind yk? Have fun ily
creator: Viciously Yearning
